## Axon flagged as potentially fully valued as ethics concerns gain momentum

A simultaneously full valuation and rising ESG/ethics overhang is a challenging combination for multiple expansion — PM should watch whether ethics concerns crystallize into regulatory or contract risk, which would be a more material catalyst than valuation alone.

- SimplyWall.st analysis suggests AXON stock may be fully priced at current levels
- Growing ethics headwinds are cited alongside valuation concerns — dual ceiling risk
- No specific valuation metric or ethics incident is named in the headline
- Relevant to surveillance and security tech sector positioning
